---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What workflow is hard or impossible today? Concrete use cases beat abstract wishes. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What should sharktopus do differently? Include API sketches if relevant. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, and why the proposed one is better. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Purely additive (new module / function / flag)
- [ ] Changes existing behavior (may need migration path)
- [ ] Changes public API signatures (breaking)

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I'd like to implement this myself and open a PR
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] Reporting only — looking for someone else to pick it up
